General.Name: Barbara Bui SA
General.Description: Barbara Bui SA, together with its subsidiaries, provides ready-to-wear clothing and accessories for women in France, rest of Europe, the United States, Canada, East countries, Africa, and the Middle East. It operates through Shops and Circulation segments. The company offers coats, jackets, tailoring, velvet suits, leather, pants, denim, knitwear, shirts, tops, t-shirts, dresses, skirts, outerwear, trousers, jackets, and wedding apparel; and accessories, such as bags, shoes, belts, scarves, ties, hats, and jewelry. It sells its products through distributors, as well as through online and offline stores. The company exports its products. Barbara Bui SA was incorporated in 1982 and is headquartered in Paris, France.
General.Address: 32, rue des Francs Bourgeois, Paris, France, 75003
